programme.desc: This heartfelt local documentary celebrates a community of individuals with special needs. It shares the lives of those with Down syndrome, autism, intellectual disabilities, and other challenges.

programme.title: Wartime Food - EP 3 战地食谱
programme.desc: During the Korean War, Korean food that is easy to prepare and filling played a key role. Soldiers survive on barley "fist rice". A special rice soup is said to have won battles for a general. Discover the origins of the Army Stew, cold noodles and blood sausage with presenter Emily Chan.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 44 加油我的人生
programme.desc: This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 12 爱之轮回
programme.desc: Bi De is at a loss after an accident caused Bi An to time travel instead of him. It is now Bi An's turn to feel strange by his surroundings in modern day 2020. Xiao Ping thinks that "Bi De" is behaving strangely after his return.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 13 三姐弟要勇敢
programme.desc: To help Taizhu pay off her debts, Xiangjun takes a role he does not like. Overwhelmed by losses from fraud, Taizhu moves to cheaper housing and refuses the money Xiangjun offers.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 14 三姐弟要勇敢
programme.desc: Zhenshu learns what Taizhu has been going through all these years and immediately realises how much she has suffered in the Jin family. She apologises to Taizhu and resolves to live with her.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 13 我们回家吧 (第三季)
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: The Witch’s Diner - EP 8 来魔女食堂吧
programme.desc: Zheng Zhen returns to the Witch's Diner and stops Xi Luo from sacrificing herself in an attempt to break the curse placed upon her.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.desc: In Ai, Ai, Cef!, kids take over the kitchen as head chefs and go head to head in the ultimate cook-off! But every chef needs an assistant, and in AI, AI, CEF, two stars will join our little chefs in their mission to improve the judges - but with their faces hidden behind masks. Who are these assistant chefs? In each episode, two well-known figures --- actors, singers, influencers, athletes, housing agents and more --- join the show as mystery guest.

programme.title: Makan Viral - EP 8
programme.desc: Makan Viral is a show where the host will travel to various destinations to test various foods and drinks, while meeting interesting people with interesting stories. The trip itself offers an interesting panoramic view with the opportunity to meet personalities who will share their passion for food and lifestyle.

programme.title: Cinta Bukan Milik Kita - EP 2
programme.desc: Redza inherits the responsibility of taking care of his household after the death of his father. Azalea, Redza’s cousin, continues her toxic relationship with Asran, who is focusing on being a Muay Thai fighter.

programme.title: Bukan Puteri Lindungan Bulan - EP 32
programme.desc: Farah is unhappy when Zafir is not excited by her surprise announcement. Zakuan bumps into Sabrina and suspects that she needs help.

programme.title: ORIGENE - EP 1
programme.desc: Dahlia, a KTV hostess with a troubled past, discovers she's the daughter of Fauzah, a famous but terminally ill chef. Torn between resentment and curiosity, Dahlia confronts family, love, and survival. Can she embrace her new identity before it's too late?

programme.title: Mentua - EP 3
programme.desc: Azizah is furious over Amir's sudden marriage to Emilia, seeing her as the cause of his defiance. Determined to regain control, she issues an ultimatum that could ruin their happiness.

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara - EP 5
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: You Know Nothing About Sports - EP 10
programme.desc: The You Know Nothing series returns with Sherry venturing into sports. She partners with a well-known celebrity to learn a new sport, coached by a celebrated athlete. Host : Sherry Alhadad

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Clynn by Nature Hair Regrowth Bundle
programme.desc: A simple, plant based organic three-step system designed to naturally restore scalp health, block DHT, and revive dormant roots for noticeably thicker, fuller hair. Safe for anyone above 4 yrs old and stop Excessive Hair Shedding in One Week! 一款天然有机的植物萃取养护头皮头发系统，有助于恢复头皮健康、抑制双氢睾酮（DHT），并激活休眠毛囊，让秀发显著加密更显丰盈。安全温和，4岁以上人群均可放心使用，助您在短短一周内有效减少过度掉发！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Mirtogenol Plus+
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol® and Mirtoselect®—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline

Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Circulon 125

It helps to boost blood circulation, concentration, and enhance mental clarity, and helps relieve cold and numb hands and feet caused by poor blood circulation. 更高含量活性银杏，有助于提升您的思维和血液循环 Thomson Circulon 125 – 125 毫克高含量活性银杏精华，采用日本尖端活性技术，提升吸收率。它有助于促进血液循环、集中注意力、提升思维清晰度。有助于缓解因血液循环不良而产生的手脚冰冷麻痹等状况。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Worm Eaters
programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: Paper Tiger
programme.desc: A somewhat prim and proper Englishman is hired as the tutor to the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: Cerai
programme.desc: Pengalaman berkurung dengan pasangan selama musim PKP memaksa dua pasangan suami isteri menilai semula perkahwinan mereka yang telah disalah ertikan selama ini.

programme.title: Hingga Jumpa Lagi
programme.desc: Eva is diagnosed with cancer and prays that she could travel back to the past in order to prevent the love between her and her husband so that her husband can lead a happy life. Her prayer is granted…

programme.title: I Heart You Cik Yah
programme.desc: Zulkefli and Badariah are always arguing, but in order to prevent the factory where they work from being closed by Qarina, they must work together. Out of hatred, they start feeling for each other.

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: Jihan Nak Displin Anak
programme.desc: Jihan dan suami kalut apabila anak mereka tidak mahu pulang beraya di kampung. Mereka cuba untuk mendisiplinkan anak mereka sebelum hari raya

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Tebus
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Mikail telah di culik dan untuk menyelamatkan anaknya dia cuba mengimbau kembali sejarah lampau dirinya ketika menyertai kumpulan gangster.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung
programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap. Dilakonkan oleh Kamal Adli dan Nabila Huda.

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.

programme.title: Bibik Aku Nak Kahwin
programme.desc: Milah yang terlalu berharap untuk berkahwin, akhirnya menemui jodoh secara tiba-tiba. Lakonan Didie Alias, Hairul Azreen dan Nabila AF.

programme.title: Baby-Sita
programme.desc: Two grand-theft-auto and best friends Adam & Hatim discovered a baby at the back seat of a stolen car. Keen to avoid detection, they take care of the baby while figuring out how to return the baby without getting caught

programme.title: Baby Jarum
programme.desc: Mami Jarum is back! and this time Mami is making sure her grand-daughter Asyikin will marry the man of her choosing, however Asyikin has a better plan (or worse!) for herself.

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Georgia
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver embarks on a culinary journey through Georgia, exploring Tbilisi’s lively markets and the picturesque Kakheti wine region. He learns from local chefs, indulges in traditional dishes like Khinkali and Chakapuli, and participates in a festive Supra feast. Inspired by Georgia’s unique cuisine at the crossroads of East and West, Jamie returns home to create his own Georgian-inspired Sunday roast.

The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree
programme.desc: Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree are crafted as pure juices with no sugar, no water, and no preservatives. Each sachet delivers natural nourishment anytime, anywhere. Jujube helps boost energy, support immunity, improve sleep, and enhance women’s wellness, while mulberry provides rich antioxidants, improves eyes health, and promotes radiant skin. Health+ 红枣原汁 + 桑葚原浆采用纯果汁制作，不加糖、不加水、无防腐剂。每一小包都能随时随地为你补充天然营养。红枣有助提升气血、增强免疫力、改善睡眠、呵护女性健康；桑葚则富含抗氧化成分，有助护眼、促进皮肤亮泽，全面提升你的状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ascen resources ITOH Sugabloc
programme.desc: A daily blood sugar support supplement from Japan’s ITOH Kanpo. With 4 natural herbal ingredients working together, it helps slow down sugar absorption and reduce post-meal spikes. By keeping glucose levels more stable, it supports better energy, weight control, and heart health—so you can enjoy your meals without worrying about sudden sugar highs. 来自日本井藤汉方的日常控糖配方，结合4大天然草本成分，帮助减缓糖分吸收，稳定餐后血糖。让血糖不再忽高忽低，减少饭后疲倦，同时有助体重管理和心血管健康。让你在享受美食的同时，也能更安心地管理血糖。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Dampness & Blood supplement
programme.desc: Kampo Blood Clean Supplement combines traditional herbal wisdom with modern wellness needs. Helps normalize blood pressure, blood sugar, and cholesterol levels. Helps to promote clear, flexible, and elastic blood vessels, reducing stroke risk. Kampo Anti-dampness capsules help remove excess dampness from the body and balance internal energy for optimal health. Helps eliminate edema and reduce water retention. 日本制造。融合传统汉方智慧与现代科技，严选中药及草本植物精华，配方温和纯净，天然无添加。有助于调节血压、血糖和胆固醇水平。有助于促进血管通畅、柔韧有弹性。日本制造，有助于清除体内湿气。平衡内气，促进健康。帮助消除水肿，减少水肿。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Cheong Dam Black Change Shampoo
programme.desc: Grey Hair Coverage in just 5 washes! 全新4合1遮白洗发水：含天然成分，白发5天内变黑发！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day. Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑，富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白，采用先进脱膻技术，保留营养与纯净口感，连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用。 还特别添加叶黄素、胶原蛋白和 Omega-3，支持眼睛、关节及心脑血管健康。每天两杯，补钙增强免疫力，适合全家饮用，特别适合年长人士，助力骨骼健康与活力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE Bio-Ray Plantar Fasciitis Compression Foot Sleeves
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity. 支撑足弓，稳固筋膜，有效缓解疼痛和肿胀。袜子轻轻包覆脚部肌肉和筋腱，加上日本生化能技术，促进血气循环，让脚更舒适、更快恢复。防滑、柔软透气，全天穿都舒服，不管是运动还是穿袜子都合适！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kale Powder
programme.desc: The Kale is a superfood packed with 23 essential nutrients to support daily dietary needs. Our organic pure kale powder contains no additives, preservatives, added antioxidants, or colorants, making it suitable for all ages to maintain a healthy lifestyle. 羽衣甘蓝是一种富含23种必需营养素的超级食物，可满足日常膳食需求。我们的有机纯羽衣甘蓝粉无添加剂、防腐剂、抗氧化剂和色素，适合所有年龄段人群，有助于保持健康.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker
programme.desc: La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you’re simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables! 这款La Gourmet 火焰电饭锅将火锅和烧烤炉结合一体。为您提供两全其美的享受。无论您是煮汤还是烧烤肉类和蔬菜，都能享受多功能的膳食准备！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Biowell Vital Fish Oil
programme.desc: Biowell Vital Fish Oil, contains 97% Omega-3 and adds red yeast, helping maintain the health level of the three highs. It is suitable for people who care about heart and brain health. Biowell concentrated Fish Oil, 95% concentrated fish oil. High in DHA and added with lutein. It helps improve memory, protect eyesight, and relieve dry and tired eyes. Biowell Vital Fish Oil 针对三高族群设计，含有高达97%纯度的Omega-3，并特别添加红曲，有助于维护心、血管健康、维护胆固醇、有助于稳定血压和血糖。Biowell concentrated Fish Oil, 95%高纯度浓缩鱼油；富含DHA并添加叶黄素，有助提升专注力、保护视力、缓解眼睛干涩疲劳，脑眼双补！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - SINGCHOICE Bone Health Formula & Eyes Nourisher
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo Premium Cordyceps & Bitter Melon Triple Cleanse
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. Health+ 日本汉方苦瓜三清素帮你清热解毒、平衡血糖、促进代谢，Health+ 日本汉方至尊虫草胶囊补气养血、提升免疫力和精力。精选草本精华，GMP认证，天天养生也安心，长期调理体质更自然健康！

programme.title: NBA Rising Stars Invitational 2026 : Pool Stage
programme.desc: NBA Rising Stars Invitational, the league’s first regional high-school basketball tournament featuring boys’ and girls’ teams from 10 countries and territories across Asia-Pacific returns to Singapore for its second edition. Teams will compete in a five-day tournament at the OCBC Arena from 23 to 28 June 2026, where top individual performers from the event will have the opportunity to attend future NBA basketball development camps, showcases and programmes.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: Paper Tiger
programme.desc: A somewhat prim and proper Englishman is hired as the tutor to the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: Sandokan: Pirate of Malaysia
programme.desc: Filmed in Singapore it tells the story of Sandokan who is a Malaysian rebel who, with a group of renegades, goes up against a British General who is trying to force the King to resign.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: Diari Chinta

programme.title: Geng
programme.desc: Isabella is an ex-convict who has sworn off her life of crime. Unfortunately, her old gang boss wants her to do one last drug transaction and kidnaps her mother to blackmail Isabella. programme.desc: 3 couples falls in love with each other in 3 different love stories.

programme.title: Boyfriend Aku Dari ...
programme.desc: After being disappointed multiple times, Risya is introduced by a friend to Andy, a nerdy young man. They fall in love but in actuality, Andy is a boyfriend from 'hell'!

programme.title: Gengster Leng Chai
programme.desc: Black is a failure of a gangster, being too soft hearted with people. After meeting Mawar, he is determined to change despite the objections of others.

programme.title: Strawberi Karipap Sesat Kat Paris
programme.desc: Nini and Haikal start their big adventure to find their aunty Lisa who gets a job offer as a professional photographer in Paris. Unfortunately, their journey turns upside down when they arrive in Paris and ruin a newly-wed coupleís honeymoon.

programme.title: Nota Silam
programme.desc: Munirah menjumpai sebuah nota cinta di dalam sebuah buku yang diperolehi secara rambang dari 'blind date with a book' dan cuba untuk menemukan pasangan di dalam nota tersebut yang merubah hidup Munirah

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche
programme.desc: Seorang penulis skrip kisah-kisah cinta tetapi masih bersendirian mengimpikan cinta dalam kehidupan realitinya, lalu dia menyertai sebuah kumpulan terapi untuk berkongsi masalah peribadinya.

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.title: Ting Tong, Love
programme.desc: Bored by his mother's insistence on his getting married, Hairi finally agrees on the condition that he could choose his own soul mate. Does the choice of Hairi meet with his mother's approval?

programme.title: Chomel
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Mimi's family fell apart. One day, Mimi finds Chomel, a cat and brings it home, only for it to cause a series of events that brings her broken family back together again.
